title: ranunculus cornutus var. scandicinus
intro: Ranunculus cornutus var. scandicinus, also known as the Scandian Buttercup, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Ranunculaceae family. This plant is traditionally used in medicine for its anti-inflammatory and analgesic properties, making it a potential treatment for conditions such as arthritis and gout. The health benefits of Scandian Buttercup include reducing pain and swelling, as well as its potential to act as an antiseptic and antispasmodic. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health issues.
